languages.original_text: "We have nothing more to discuss, and your presence here is inappropriate. I have opened a dimensional passage that will lead you out of the Museion and back to your ship. Go now." {n}The xenos speaks in a tone of weary irritation and... something else. Something strange and dangerous.{/n}

languages.text: "Нам больше не о чем говорить, и твое присутствие здесь неуместно. Я открыл пространственный проход, который выведет тебя из Музеона и вернет на твой корабль. Ступай же". {n}В голосе ксеноса звучит усталое раздражение и... что-то еще. Что-то странное и опасное.{/n}
languages.translation_comment: Перед этим куем должна проиграться катсцена "Тразин открывает портал"
Перед этим куем должна проиграться катсцена "Тразин открывает портал"

languages.text: «No tenemos nada más de lo que hablar y tu presencia aquí es inapropiada. He abierto un pasaje dimensional que te sacará del Museion para devolverte a tu nave. Vete». {n}El xenos habla con una irritación cansada y... algo más. Algo extraño y peligroso.{/n}
languages.original_text: "We have nothing more to discuss, and your presence here is inappropriate. I have opened a dimensional passage that will lead you out of the Museion and back to your ship. Go now." {n}The xenos speaks in a tone of weary irritation and... something else. Something strange and dangerous.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «No tenemos nada más de lo que hablar y tu presencia aquí es inapropiada. He abierto un pasaje dimensional que te sacará del Museion para devolverte a tu nave. Vete». {n}El xenos habla con una irritación cansada y... algo más. Algo extraño y peligroso.{/n}

languages.text: “我们没什么好谈的了，你不该待在这儿。我已经打开了一个次元通道，可以送你离开陈列馆，回到舰船上。走吧。”{n}异形的语气疲惫而恼怒……还夹杂着某种怪异而危险的意味。{/n}
languages.original_text: "We have nothing more to discuss, and your presence here is inappropriate. I have opened a dimensional passage that will lead you out of the Museion and back to your ship. Go now." {n}The xenos speaks in a tone of weary irritation and... something else. Something strange and dangerous.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “我们没什么好谈的了，你不该待在这儿。我已经打开了一个次元通道，可以送你离开陈列馆，回到舰船上。走吧。”{n}异形的语气疲惫而恼怒……还夹杂着某种怪异而危险的意味。{/n}

languages.text: « Cette discussion est close et votre présence ici est devenue inconvenante. J'ai ouvert un passage dimensionnel qui vous permettra de quitter le Muséion pour retourner à bord de votre vaisseau. Partez, » {n}déclare le xénos sur un ton exprimant son irritation, sa lassitude et... quelque chose d'autre. Quelque chose d'étrange et de dangereux.{/n}
languages.original_text: "We have nothing more to discuss, and your presence here is inappropriate. I have opened a dimensional passage that will lead you out of the Museion and back to your ship. Go now." {n}The xenos speaks in a tone of weary irritation and... something else. Something strange and dangerous.{/n}

languages.text: "Konuşacak başka bir şeyimiz kalmadı ve artık burada bulunman uygunsuz. Seni Museion'dan çıkarıp gemine geri götürecek boyutlar arası bir geçit açtım. Git artık." {n}Zenonun konuşması, yorgun bir rahatsızlığa ve... Başka bir tona sahip. Tuhaf ve tehlikeli bir ton.{/n}
languages.original_text: "We have nothing more to discuss, and your presence here is inappropriate. I have opened a dimensional passage that will lead you out of the Museion and back to your ship. Go now." {n}The xenos speaks in a tone of weary irritation and... something else. Something strange and dangerous.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Konuşacak başka bir şeyimiz kalmadı ve artık burada bulunman uygunsuz. Seni Museion'dan çıkarıp gemine geri götürecek boyutlar arası bir geçit açtım. Git artık." {n}Zenonun konuşması, yorgun bir rahatsızlığa ve... Başka bir tona sahip. Tuhaf ve tehlikeli bir ton.{/n}

languages.text: "Wir haben nichts mehr zu besprechen und deine Anwesenheit hier ist unangemessen. Ich habe ein Dimensionstor geöffnet, das dich aus dem Museion und zurück auf dein Schiff bringen wird. Geh jetzt." {n}Der Xenos spricht mit einem Ton müder Verärgerung, aber ... da ist noch etwas. Etwas Seltsames und Gefährliches.{/n}
languages.original_text: "We have nothing more to discuss, and your presence here is inappropriate. I have opened a dimensional passage that will lead you out of the Museion and back to your ship. Go now." {n}The xenos speaks in a tone of weary irritation and... something else. Something strange and dangerous.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Wir haben nichts mehr zu besprechen und deine Anwesenheit hier ist unangemessen. Ich habe ein Dimensionstor geöffnet, das dich aus dem Museion und zurück auf dein Schiff bringen wird. Geh jetzt." {n}Der Xenos spricht mit einem Ton müder Verärgerung, aber ... da ist noch etwas. Etwas Seltsames und Gefährliches.{/n}

languages.text: 「もう議論するべきことは何もありません。そして、あなたの存在は不適切です。私は次元の間を塞いで、あなたをミュゼイオンから離れ、あなたの船に戻すでしょう。今すぐ行け。」{n}異星人は疲れたような苛立ちと…何か別の感情で話している。何か奇妙で危険な感情だ。{/n}
languages.original_text: "We have nothing more to discuss, and your presence here is inappropriate. I have opened a dimensional passage that will lead you out of the Museion and back to your ship. Go now." {n}The xenos speaks in a tone of weary irritation and... something else. Something strange and dangerous.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「もう議論するべきことは何もありません。そして、あなたの存在は不適切です。私は次元の間を塞いで、あなたをミュゼイオンから離れ、あなたの船に戻すでしょう。今すぐ行け。」{n}異星人は疲れたような苛立ちと…何か別の感情で話している。何か奇妙で危険な感情だ。{/n}
